channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: This 22-year-old made an app to help farmers predict risks to their crops
item.description: Rice feeds half the global population, but for many farmers, growing the grain feels like a high-stakes gamble. One in five sacks is lost to threats including pests, crop disease and extreme weather.
item.dc:creator: Jeremy Caplan, Fast Company

item.title: CrowdStrike claws back market value after triggering largest IT outage in history
item.description: Despite taking a heavy hit after the July 2024 outage, CrowdStrike’s market value is now close to where it was previously
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Augmenting Sound and Touch: Microsoft's Patent for Haptic Trackpad Loudspeaker
item.description: Microsoft has filed a patent for a haptic trackpad loudspeaker, which could potentially enhance or replace the speakers in future Surface Laptops. The concept involves using the touchpad as both a speaker and a tactile feedback device.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: The Samsung Frame TV is going pro with a Neo QLED picture and a wireless One Connect box – plus the Art Store arrives on other TVs
item.description: While 2024 brought a new category of Samsung’s Frame – a smart speaker dubbed the Music Frame – 2025 is ushering in an entirely new Frame TV – the Frame Pro, with a Neo QLED screen.
item.dc:creator: jacob.krol@futurenet.com (Jacob Krol), TechRadar

item.title: Find out who’s behind any phone number with this free lookup tool
item.description: I don’t know about you, but practically every time my phone rings, my heart rate starts skyrocketing.
item.dc:creator: JR Raphael, Fast Company

item.title: Net neutrality never stood a chance
item.description: A federal appeals court sealed the fate of the Biden administration’s efforts to regulate internet providers on Thursday, striking down the Federal Communications Commission’s 2024 net neutrality order once and for all.
item.dc:creator: Issie Lapowsky, Fast Company

item.title: The step I take to clear my inbox every January
item.description: It's easy to find yourself swamped in unread emails. Here are a few simple steps to archiving them and clearing out some of your digital clutter.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: What to know about Apple's $95 million settlement of the snooping Siri case
item.description: Apple has agreed to pay $95 million to settle a lawsuit that accused the company of turning its virtual assistant Siri into a snoop that eavesdropped on the users of iPhones and other trendy devices in a betrayal to its long-standing commitment to personal privacy.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Chinese cyber firm linked to botnet attack sanctioned in US
item.description: The federal government hit Chinese cyber group Integrity Technology Group with new sanctions on Friday, citing alleged computer intrusion incidents against those in the U.S. At the direction of the China, hackers associated with the Integrity Technology Group allegedly targeted multiple U.S.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Turo rentals emerge as common thread in Las Vegas Cybertruck and New Orleans deadly incidents
item.description: Turo faces scrutiny after tragic incidents involving rented vehicles, raising questions about security measures and regulatory frameworks.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Top 9 generative AI use cases for business
item.description: The launch of ChatGPT in November 2022 set off a generative AI gold rush, with companies scrambling to adopt the technology and demonstrate innovation.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Apple to pay $95 million to settle lawsuit accusing Siri of eavesdropping
item.description: Apple has agreed to pay $95 million to settle a lawsuit accusing the privacy-minded company of deploying its virtual assistant Siri to eavesdrop on people using its iPhone and other trendy devices.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Easy internet sleuth tricks you’ll wish you knew sooner
item.description: Here are some powerful online sleuthing tricks you can use to check the credibility of a website, see old pictures of places you've lived and even learn more about your neighbors.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: California begins 2025 with solid start to winter snowpack, but more storms are needed
item.description: California is beginning 2025 with a solid start to the winter snowpack, but more storms are needed to keep the state’s water supplies on track.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Tesla Cybertruck joins short list of EVs eligible for $7,500 tax credit
item.description: The number of EVs and plug-in hybrids currently qualified for a credit is 18 models, down from 22 last year.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: AI, power availability and Intel’s future
item.description: As 2025 kicks off, it’s time to dust off the crystal ball. Here are my data center predictions for the coming year. 1) Trump backs off on tech tariffs For all the handwringing, Trump has a history of not following through on his threats.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: 44 awesome Android app discoveries from 2024
item.description: It’s the calm before the storm. Today, on New Year’s Day, we have a brief moment to pause and prepare — and set ourselves up for success. From a tech perspective, that means taking the time to clean up and optimize your smartphone setup.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: 4 keys for writing cross-platform apps
item.description: These days, most every application has the potential to be a cross-platform application. That’s great for users but often difficult for developers.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: The biggest Wi-Fi mistake you didn’t know you were making
item.description: There are many untapped safeguards and tips you can learn to take your Wi-Fi knowledge to the next level, technology expert Kim Komando shares her tricks.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The vital role of red teaming in safeguarding AI systems and data
item.description: Companies are feeling pressure to adopt generative AI to stay ahead in a competitive global market. To ensure they adopt responsibly, governing and regulatory bodies across the world are convening to debate and understand the best ways to address AI risk without stifling their innovation edge.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Venezuela's top court issues a $10 million fine for TikTok over allegedly deadly video challenges
item.description: CARACAS, Venezuela (AP) — Venezuela’s Supreme Court on Monday issued a $10 million fine against TikTok for “not implementing measures” to prevent viral video challenges that have allegedly led to the deaths of three Venezuelan children recently.
item.dc:creator: JUAN PABLO ARRAEZ and MANUEL RUEDA, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Rhode Islanders' data was leaked from a cyberattack on state health benefits website
item.description: PROVIDENCE, R.I. (AP) — Cybercriminals who hacked Rhode Island’s system for health and benefits programs have released files to a site on the dark web, a scenario the state has been preparing for, Gov. Daniel McKee said Monday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KREX 5
